column1: Luis Arraez sits atop today’s Beat The Streak board, leading off for Baltimore with his signature steady bat and a strong 70.4% hit probability against Cade Povich in a hitter-friendly park. Right behind him, Roman Anthony brings a similar top-of-order reliability for St. Louis, plus the lefty gets a clear platoon edge against Andre Pallante in another favorable road matchup. Brendan Donovan and Miguel Andujar also offer reliable profiles, both capitalizing on platoon advantages and prime lineup spots. For streakers, Arraez is the gold standard tonight, but Anthony’s matchup makes him a sharp alternative.
